hero_subtitle: SFTY connects multi-provider KYT outputs into structured case workflows that preserve audit evidence and streamline wallet risk review for regulated digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: KYT wallet risk reviews depend on manual handoffs
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with managing wallet risk data from multiple providers due to disconnected outputs and inconsistent case linkage. This delays investigations, weakens audit readiness and creates gaps in tracing risk signals through the review process.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes wallet risk signals from multiple providers and links them to structured cases, preserving review history, decision logs and audit evidence within one unified compliance workflow.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case management
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk signals from multiple providers and routes alerts through structured case workflows for review, decision logging and evidence preservation.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond KYT alerts. One case-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multi-provider KYT outputs into structured cases, workflows, decisions and audit evidence without replacing existing analytics or monitoring tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with provider-neutral KYT orchestration, preserving audit-ready evidence and enabling bank due diligence within a secure enterprise deployment framework.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY connect KYT alerts to case management workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how wallet risk alerts route into compliance cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence from multiple KYT providers is preserved
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how SFTY supports review and escalation of KYT cases
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASPs with a compliance layer that connects KYT, KYC, Travel Rule and screening outputs into connected cases, workflows, decisions and reporting across jurisdictions.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage KYT alert workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures KYT alerts by aggregating wallet risk signals from multiple providers, applying rules, routing reviews, creating cases and linking alerts to transactions and entities.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence to support audit-ready records for compliance teams and regulatory reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects multiple KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one layer without replacing them, maintaining existing workflows and enhancing orchestration.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or blockchain providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above providers to connect their outputs into workflows and compliance decisions rather than replacing underlying KYT or blockchain analytics vendors.
final_title: Connect KYT alerts into structured case workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects multi-provider wallet risk outputs into controlled cases, audit evidence and streamlined compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
